R Notebook

This is an R Markdown Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code.

Try executing this chunk by clicking the Run button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing Ctrl+Shift+Enter.

# Load and plot
library(quantmod)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggthemes)
GLD <- getSymbols("GLD",env=NULL ) %>% as.data.frame() 
SPY <- getSymbols("SPY",env=NULL ) %>% as.data.frame() 
VIX <- getSymbols("^VIX",env=NULL ) %>% as.data.frame() 
VIX3M <- getSymbols("^VIX3M",env=NULL ) %>% as.data.frame() 
GLD <- GLD %>% rownames_to_column("date") %>% dplyr::select(date, GLD.Adjusted)
SPY <- SPY %>% rownames_to_column("date") %>% dplyr::select(date, SPY.Adjusted)
VIX <- VIX %>% rownames_to_column("date") %>% dplyr::select(date, VIX.Adjusted)
VIX3M <- VIX3M %>% rownames_to_column("date") %>% dplyr::select(date, VIX3M.Adjusted)
term_structure <- full_join(VIX, VIX3M) %>% mutate(term_structure = VIX.Adjusted / VIX3M.Adjusted, by="date") %>% dplyr::select(date, term_structure)
df <- Reduce(function(...) full_join(..., by = "date"), list(GLD, SPY, VIX, VIX3M, term_structure)) %>% 
    pivot_longer(cols = -date, names_to = "ticker") %>% 
    mutate(ticker=sub(".Adjusted", "", ticker))
df %>% ggplot(aes(x=date,y=value,color=ticker,group=ticker)) + geom_line() + scale_color_colorblind()

# building the data frames
df_lag <- df %>% mutate(wday = lubridate::wday(date, label = TRUE)) %>% group_by(ticker) %>% 
    mutate(ret = c(0, diff(log(value)))) %>% ungroup
df_lag <- df_lag %>% group_by(ticker) %>% mutate(up = lag(ret) > 0) %>% ungroup
df_gld <- df_lag %>% dplyr::filter(ticker == "GLD") %>% dplyr::select(date, up) %>% rename(GLDup=up)
df_spy <- df_lag %>% dplyr::filter(ticker == "SPY") %>% dplyr::select(date, up) %>% rename(SPYup=up)
df_vix <- df_lag %>% dplyr::filter(ticker == "VIX") %>% dplyr::select(date, up) %>% rename(VIXup=up)
df_vix3m <- df_lag %>% dplyr::filter(ticker == "VIX3M") %>% dplyr::select(date, up) %>% rename(VIX3Mup=up)
df_term <- df_lag %>% dplyr::filter(ticker == "term_structure") %>% dplyr::select(date, up) %>% rename(termUP=up)
df_full <- full_join(df_lag, df_spy, by="date") %>% full_join(., df_vix, by="date") %>% full_join(., df_term, by="date") %>% full_join(., df_gld, by="date") %>% mutate(date=as.Date(date)) %>% arrange(date)
# Average GLD move, and conditional on previous day and contango
df_full %>% dplyr::filter(ticker == "GLD") %>% group_by(wday) %>% 
    reframe(M = mean(ret*100, na.rm=T), S = sd(ret*100, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n())  )  %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x=wday, y=M, ymin=M-S, ymax=M+S)) + geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge", width = 0.5) + geom_errorbar(width=0.25, position = position_dodge(0.5)) + ggtitle("Average daily move")

df_full %>% dplyr::filter(ticker == "GLD") %>% group_by(wday, GLDup) %>% 
    reframe(M = mean(ret*100, na.rm=T), S = sd(ret*100, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n())  )  %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x=wday, y=M, ymin=M-S, ymax=M+S, fill=GLDup)) + geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge", width = 0.5) + geom_errorbar(width=0.25, position = position_dodge(0.5)) + ggtitle("Daily move if previous day up")

df_full %>% dplyr::filter(ticker == "GLD") %>% group_by(wday, SPYup) %>% 
    reframe(M = mean(ret*100, na.rm=T), S = sd(ret*100, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n())  )  %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x=wday, y=M, ymin=M-S, ymax=M+S, fill=SPYup)) + geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge", width = 0.5) + geom_errorbar(width=0.25, position = position_dodge(0.5)) + ggtitle("Daily move if SPY previous day up")

df_full %>% dplyr::filter(ticker == "GLD") %>% group_by(wday, VIXup) %>% 
    reframe(M = mean(ret*100, na.rm=T), S = sd(ret*100, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n())  )  %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x=wday, y=M, ymin=M-S, ymax=M+S, fill=VIXup)) + geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge", width = 0.5) + geom_errorbar(width=0.25, position = position_dodge(0.5))+ ggtitle("Daily move if VIX previous day up")

df_full %>% dplyr::filter(ticker == "GLD") %>% group_by(wday, termUP) %>% 
    reframe(M = mean(ret*100, na.rm=T), S = sd(ret*100, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n())  )  %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x=wday, y=M, ymin=M-S, ymax=M+S, fill=termUP)) + geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge", width = 0.5) + geom_errorbar(width=0.25, position = position_dodge(0.5))+ ggtitle("Daily move if term structure UP")

NA
# Some Statistic
df_full %>%  dplyr::filter(wday=="Fri" & ticker == "GLD") %>% 
    mutate(naive_pnl = ret * 1, 
           adv_pnl = if_else(termUP, 0.5*ret, 1.5*ret)) %>% 
    summarize(
        MeanNaive = mean(naive_pnl, na.rm=T),
        SdNaive = sd(naive_pnl, na.rm=T),
        SdAnnNaive = sd(naive_pnl, na.rm=T)*sqrt(52),
        SRNaive = mean(naive_pnl, na.rm=T)/sd(naive_pnl, na.rm=T)*sqrt(52),
        MeanAdv = mean(adv_pnl, na.rm=T),
        SdAdv = sd(adv_pnl, na.rm=T),
        SdAnnAdv = sd(adv_pnl, na.rm=T)*sqrt(52),
        SRAdv = mean(adv_pnl, na.rm=T)/sd(adv_pnl, na.rm=T)*sqrt(52)

    ) %>% t
                  [,1]
MeanNaive  0.001021059
SdNaive    0.011909979
SdAnnNaive 0.085884079
SRNaive    0.618217977
MeanAdv    0.001704643
SdAdv      0.016256717
SdAnnAdv   0.117228854
SRAdv      0.756140152
# Equity backtest
df_bt <- df_full %>% na.omit %>% dplyr::filter(wday=="Fri" & ticker == "GLD") %>% mutate(naive_pnl = ret * 1, adv_pnl = if_else(GLDup, 0.5*ret, 1.5*ret)) %>% na.omit %>% mutate(naive_eq = cumsum(naive_pnl), adv_eq = cumsum(adv_pnl)) 
df_bt %>% ggplot(aes(date)) + geom_line(aes(y=naive_eq), color="black") + geom_line(aes(y=adv_eq), color="blue")

mean(df_bt$naive_pnl) / sd(df_bt$naive_pnl) * sqrt(52)
[1] 0.618218
mean(df_bt$adv_pnl) / sd(df_bt$adv_pnl) * sqrt(52)
[1] 0.6749406
